title: serpyllum lanuginosum
intro: Serpyllum lanuginosum, also known as Woolly Germander or Catmint, is a perennial herb native to Europe, North Africa, and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, and is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Serpyllum lanuginosum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
